notes: Rebuilt rq-dashboard Flask web application from scratch. The package provides a web frontend to monitor RQ (Redis Queue) queues, jobs, and workers. Key components: (1) cli.py with make_flask_app() factory and click-based CLI, (2) web.py Flask blueprint with routes for dashboard, JSON APIs, job management, and queue operations, (3) escape_format_instance_list() for masking Redis credentials. All 18 tests passing.
